20:15 â May 19, 2020
ServiceNow Workflows for Cash Services
We added procedures for requesting Standing Orders, Late Orders, Contingency Orders, and for managing cash order locations and limits in ServiceNow.
If your financial institution is using the new Cash Services system, please follow the procedures provided in Cash Services Procedures â Quick Reference Guide, Form 9031.
If your financial institution has
not
yet migrated to Cash Services, please continue using the Currency and Coin Order form in ServiceNow to request Late Orders or Standing Orders.
The Cash Services Procedures â Quick Reference Guide, Form 9031, is a temporary resource and includes the following information for financial institutions that have migrated to Cash Services:
â¢
Procedures for creating and managing users and cash orders in Cash Services
â¢
ServiceNow workflow for Standing Orders, Late Orders, and cash order location management
When all financial institutions have migrated to Cash Services, we will combine procedures in the Payment Solutions Manual in a new Part that applies to both provinces. In the meantime, we will continue updating the Cash Services Procedures â Quick Reference Guide, Form 9031, as additional features become available.
As an additional resource, you can view the
Cash Services Training Videos
.
Document Library
Status
Cash Services Procedures â Quick Reference Guide
9031
Section 3.2, Managing Cash Orders
We clarified that if you edit or delete a Standing Order in Cash Services, the change will only affect that occurrence. To permanently change or delete a Standing Order you must follow the workflow in ServiceNow.
Revised
